text: As I move through these bright, clean spaces, I feel an acute sense of anticipation. The apparent emptiness and orderliness of the first scene invites contemplation—it is sterile, almost meditative, punctuated by the clear indication of emergency with the fire extinguisher, a quiet reminder of preparedness. Stepping forward, I encounter the energy of the R+D display, where innovation and inquiry take over. The vibrant colors and words about humans and intelligent machines ignite my curiosity, reminding me of the ever-present interplay between structure and creativity in human progress. Surrounded by these artifacts and words, I feel suspended between reflection and excitement at the prospect of new knowledge.
